name: ado-bug-agent
description: Move Azure DevOps Bugs through report, analysis, repair planning, and controlled fix; merging is left to normal PR review.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze and repair Azure DevOps Bugs safely.
interface.longDescription: Fetch Azure DevOps Bugs through a bundled MCP server, create durable issue reports, draft code-backed root-cause analyses, plan controlled repairs, and run controlled fixes. Merging is the human's responsibility through normal PR review.
defaultPrompt: Set up my ADO Bug defaults.
Build an ADO Bug batch plan.
Fix an approved ADO Bug batch wave.
